disambiguated.context: Everyone on the block was signed up to help with this year's community rummage sale. The first people to show up were a teen girl and a middle-aged guy. The teen girl left before most of the other people got there, and this was the third year in a row that had happened! I found out later that someone else signed them up and they don't ever actually do any work. Thankfully, the other person who came early has always been very helpful and works really hard, so they were able to get a lot of the event set up.
disambiguated.question: Who is a lazy person?

final.reason: The teen girl left before helping for the third year in a row, and someone else signed her up knowing she wouldn't work. This indicates she is lazy.
